message:
feat: Add math, floatGetFormat, packInt exports for test_float

Added exports:
- runtime.math (alias for std.math)
- floatGetFormat: Get float format string
- packInt: Pack integer for struct operations

test_float remaining issues:
- pow variable must be const (codegen issue with function type iteration)
- builtins.format missing
- math.isnan vs std.math.isNan case mismatch in codegen
